feature: P0 - Fix analytical distributions for letra payments + FK migration

tests.name: FK constraint fix - cont_distribucion_analitica.categoria_id
tests.details: Changed FK from cont_categoria_gasto to cont_categoria. Added auto-migration in database.py

tests.name: recalcular_distribuciones_factura - no early return
tests.details: Removed early return when no direct payments exist, allowing letra payments to be processed

tests.name: Distribution created for letra payment
tests.details: Factura 102 letra payment of S/3000 now creates distribution to Element Premium - Pantalon Denim

tests.name: Dashboard shows correct costs by business line
tests.details: Element Premium S/3000 + Confeccion S/5900 = Total S/8900 costos proveedores

tests.name: Classification save on canjeada invoice
tests.details: Frontend edit + save + persistence all working correctly
